The elegant, streamlined '''Scout''' could easily be mistaken for a pleasure [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]], but it in fact it was the backbone of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Navy/Legends|Navy]], employed chiefly to assist [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] citizens against aggressive aquatic wildlife and occasional [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] raids. They eventually were used in battle against the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. They could be upgraded to support additional armaments and armor.

A Naboo scout frigate was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was stationed at the [[Naboo Rebel hangar]].<ref name="STTAC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
*''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]''
